column1: # Sample: 130 RB player-seasons (2016–2025) — high-volume cohort (prior-year top tier by workload).
Prior FP/G | PPR fantasy points per game in year N — baseline benchmark.
Rec Yards / Game | Receiving yards per game.
Yards Per Route Run | Receiving yards per route the player ran — production per opportunity in the passing game.
EPA / Touch | (Rushing EPA + Receiving EPA) per (carry + target).
Target Share | Player's share of his team's targets.
Total TDs | Rushing TDs + Receiving TDs.
Targets | Total receiving targets in year N.
Rush Yards / Game | Rushing yards per game.
YPC | Yards per carry — basic rushing efficiency.
Rush Yards | Total rushing yards in year N.
Explosive Rush Rate | Share of carries that went for 15+ yards. Big-play rate, computed from pbp.
YACo / Att | Yards after contact per attempt (PFR).
Rushes | Total carries in year N.
MTF / Att | Missed tackles forced per rush attempt (PFR's brk_tkl / att).
